title: Skeleton Banging Shield
description: Adds Skeleton Banging Shield as an Entity that can spawn in your World + with Animations!
body:
This **Mod** add's the _Banging Skeleton_ from **Skyrim** as an Entity that can naturally spawn
in the _Overworld_...

The Animation starts playing on **approach** and the Skeleton Entity will hold an _iron sword
and a shield_ on spawn.
The Entity acts similiar to a _Zombie/Wither Skeleton_ (Without wither effect) and they dont
burn in the Sun.

![The Skeleton Banging Entity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/251ea4090246f36f512ee0854a842f2322ab8bcf_0.webp)

There isn't much more that it adds, so if you guys want more similiar mobs or more stuff,
you should **follow** this **project**!



This project has one bug, that I couldn't fix, it's !sometimes! when you approach the Entity it does the Sound effect, but doesn't do the Animtion
